source: Sports Navi game batting tables for games present under generated/*/*/*-dashboard.json + 元データ/*_打撃成績.csv

notes.uBB: Unintentional walks are derived from generated plate-appearance results when an intentional-walk label is present.
notes.obp: OBP remains the official BB-based formula rather than a uBB-based variant.
notes.wrcPlus: wRC+ は対象試合の league R/PA と team park factor の半分補正を使った暫定値です。

players.player: モイセエフ ニキータ

monthlySplits.player: モイセエフ ニキータ
